sglang.title: Add finish_reason to OpenAI API
sglang.author: mgerstgrasser
sglang.bodyExcerpt: This adds support for returning the finish_reason (i.e., reached the maximum length vs. encountered a stop token) from the OpenAI API endpoints.

vllm.title: [Speculative decoding][Re-take] Enable TP>1 speculative decoding
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix tests in #4808:

Bypass broadcasting when torch.distributed is not initialized (TP=1).
Use 2-GPU runner to run the integration test with TP=2.

vllm.title: Add marlin unit tests and marlin benchmark script
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR ports marlin unit tests and benchmarking code from magic_wand, so we have all of the marlin code in one place.

vllm.title: [Kernel] add bfloat16 support for gptq marlin kernel
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some models would overflow when using fp16 inference (e.g. Deepseek-V2), so we should add bfloat16 support for quantization kernel. This PR add bfloat16 support for gptq marlin kernel.
Unlike gptq kernel in #4781 , gptq marlin kernel doesn't use atomicAdd, so the performance of bfloat16 is close to

vllm.title: [docs] Fix typo in examples filename openi -> openai
vllm.author: wuisawesome
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I had a typo in the filename in #4794. Simply rename the file.

This pr gives the openai.run_batch entrypoint a different usage context so that we can track its usage.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Bypass authorization API token for preflight requests
vllm.author: dulacp
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Browsers should not send credentials in preflight requests irrespective of this setting
source

From this guideline, we can expect that almost all browsers won't send credentials during CORS preflight requests.
So, without this condition all preflight requests (OPTIONS) will reach the server without

vllm.title: Add GPTQ Marlin 2:4 sparse structured support
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a new GPTQ Marlin 2:4 sparse structured GPU kernel and a support to run 2:4 sparse models in vllm. Currently supported configs are:

group_size of 128 or -1 (channel-wise)
4-bit or 8-bit

The new 2:4 sparse marlin GPU kernel is based on the great work of @LopezCastroRoberto and @dalista

vllm.title: Add JSON output support for benchmark_latency and benchmark_throughput
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #4847
Adds JSON output functionality to benchmark_latency.py and benchmark_throughput.py, and updates the .buildkite/run-benchmarks.sh script to utilize this feature and upload the results as artifacts.

Latency and Throughput Benchmarks: Both benchmark_latency.py and benchmark_throughput.py s

vllm.title: [ROCm][AMD][Bugfix] adding a missing triton autotune config
vllm.author: hongxiayang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Vinayak Gokhale @vgokhale found that there is a missing triton autotune config in vllm, but was added to triton repo at some point of time.
This small change however causes a series of cascading events which results in autotune picking a different config - the one that didn't exist in vllm. Without

vllm.title: [Core][Distributed] remove graph mode  function
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Users only need to use with graph_capture() to manage the context when they capture the graph, before the graph can be replayed.
Inside the capture, we need to turn on graph mode. Outside the capture, there is no need to call graph mode.
Therefore, these two functions can be merged into one.

vllm.title: [Misc] remove old comments
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: These comments are obsolete. pynccl_backend is not used elsewhere.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Add punica dimension for Qwen1.5-32B LoRA
vllm.author: Silencioo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This pr adds support for the Qwen1.5-32B model with LoRA.
To enable Qwen1.5-32B to support LoRA, it should incorporate an additional size into Punica.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Add w8a8 CUTLASS kernels
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds fp8_e4m3fn and int8 GEMM kernels, using NVIDIA CUTLASS and unit tests for them. The kernels are not used in this present PR, but are planned to be used in #4525.
The main contributions of this PR is the function cutlass_scaled_mm_dq:

Supports symmetric quantized activations and weights

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix FP8 KV cache support
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes a bug introduced in #4751 that the kv_cache_dtype arg was not correctly passed to the __init__ methods of the attention backends.

vllm.title: Support to serve vLLM on Kubernetes with LWS
vllm.author: kerthcet
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This is on behave of LWS community, we have a minimal example about how to deploy vLLM with lws for multi-host distributed inference. cc @ahg-g @liurupeng

vllm.title: [Frontend] OpenAI API server: Do not add bos token by default when encoding
vllm.author: bofenghuang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Hi,
I noticed that the BOS token is always duplicated when running with the OpenAI API server. As shown in the console output below when launching Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct, there are two repeated 128000 (bos_token_id) at the beginning of prompt_token_ids.
INFO 05-08 18:24:46 async_llm_engine.py:529]
